Why It Matters: Lower base prevents overshooting good minima
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ତୁ ବଡ଼ ଚାମଚ (5e-5) ରେ ice cream ଖାଉ — ନାକ ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିଗଲା! ଛୋଟ ଚାମଚ (2e-5) ରେ ଖାଅ — ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ କୋଳି ଆନନ୍ଦ!
English Translation: You eat ice cream with a BIG spoon (5e-5) — it falls on your nose! Use a SMALL spoon (2e-5) — every bite is perfect!

Why It Matters: Scaling was too aggressive for this task
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ବାନର (monkey) ସାଇକେଲ ଚଲାଉଥିଲା — ତାକୁ rocket ଲଗାଇ ଦେଲ! ବାନର ଆକାଶରେ ଉଡ଼ିଗଲା! Rocket ନ ଲଗାଇ ସାଇକେଲ ଚଲାଅ — ଘରେ ଖୁସିରେ ପହଞ୍ଚ।
English Translation: A monkey was cycling — someone attached a rocket! Monkey flew into the sky! Just let it cycle without rocket — reaches home happily.

Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଜେଜେମା 60 ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ରାନ୍ଧୁଛି। ତୁ ଚିଲ୍ଲାଇ କହିଲ 'ଜେଜେମା ସବୁ ଭୁଲ!' — ସେ ରାଗିଲେ! ଆସ୍ତେ ଆସ୍ତେ କହ 'ଟିକେ ନୂଆ ମସଲା ଦେଖ' — ସେ ଖୁସିରେ ଶିଖିଲେ।
English Translation: Grandma has cooked for 60 years. You yell 'Grandma everything is wrong!' — she gets angry! Softly say 'try this new spice' — she happily learns.

Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): DJ party ରେ volume 10x ବଢ଼ାଇଲ — ସବୁ ଲୋକ ପଳାଇଲେ! Volume 5x ରଖ — ସବୁ ନାଚୁଛନ୍ତି, party ଜମ୍ମ!
English Translation: At a DJ party someone cranked volume to 10x — everyone ran away! Keep it at 5x — everyone dances, party is great!

Why It Matters: High head LR caused erratic classifier training
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ପରୀକ୍ଷା ରାତି — 14 ଟି chapter ଗୋଟିଏ ରାତିରେ! Brain ଫଟ ଯାଇଛି। ଦିନକୁ 1 chapter ପଢ଼ — ସ୍ୱସ୍ଥ brain, ଭଲ result।
English Translation: Exam night — 14 chapters in one night! Brain explodes. Read 1 chapter per day — healthy brain, better result.

Why It Matters: Sqrt dampening prevents rare-class gradient domination
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): Pizza party ରେ 10 ଜଣ vegetarian, 2 ଜଣ non-veg। ଯଦି non-veg ପାଇଁ 5 ଗୁଣ pizza ଅର୍ଡ଼ର — vegetarian ଭୋକ ରହିଲେ! ସମ balance ରଖ — ସବୁ ଖୁସି।
English Translation: Pizza party — 10 vegetarians, 2 non-veg. If you order 5x pizza for non-veg — vegetarians go hungry! Keep a fair balance — everyone happy.

Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଶ୍ରେଣୀ ଭିତରେ 'know-it-all' ବନ୍ଧୁ — '100% ମୁଁ ଠିକ!' ବୋଲି ଚିଲ୍ଲାଏ, ଶୁଣୁ ନାହିଁ। ଟିକେ humble ହ '95% ଠିକ ହୋଇ ପାରେ' — ଆହୁରି ଶିଖ।
English Translation: Know-it-all friend in class — screams '100% I am right!' and never listens. Be a little humble '95% might be right' — learn even more.

Why It Matters: 128 balances GPU utilization with update frequency
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଏକା ଥରରେ 256 ଟି ମୋମୋ ଖାଇବ? ପେଟ ଫଟ ଯିବ! 128 ଟି ଖାଅ — ଠିକ ଭାବରେ ହଜମ, ଆଉ 128 ଟି ଖୁସିରେ ଖାଅ।
English Translation: Eat 256 momos in one go? Stomach will burst! Eat 128 — digest properly, then happily eat the next 128.

Why It Matters: More updates per epoch means finer optimization
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): Football practice — 55 ଥର kick। ଆଉ 110 ଥର kick practice କଲ — ଗୋଲ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ଦ୍ୱିଗୁଣ, footballer ଭଲ ହୁଏ।
English Translation: Football practice — 55 kicks. Now do 110 kicks — double the goal practice, footballer improves faster.

Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଗୋଟିଏ film 10 ଥର ଦେଖ — ସବୁ dialogue ମୁଖସ୍ଥ। 10 ଥର ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ — 100 ଥର ଦେଖିଲ ତ ଜୀବନ ନଷ୍ଟ!
English Translation: Watch a movie 10 times — you memorise all dialogues. 10 times is enough — watch 100 times and you waste your life!

Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ବଡ଼ suitcase ସବୁ ଯାତ୍ରାରେ ଭଲ ଲାଗୁ ନ ଥାଏ। ଛୋଟ FP16 bag — ହାଲୁକା, ଦ୍ରୁତ, ବସ୍ ରେ ସ୍ଥାନ ମିଳେ।
English Translation: A giant suitcase doesn't always work well for travel. A small FP16 bag — light, fast, fits on the bus.

Why It Matters: Lets classifier head converge before backbone tuning
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଘୁମୁଥିବା ଦିଗ୍ଗଜ (backbone) କୁ ଜଗାଇ ଦ। ଆଗେ ଶିଶୁ (head) ଶିଖୁ — ତା ପରେ ଦିଗ୍ଗଜ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରୁ।
English Translation: Let the sleeping giant (backbone) rest. First let the baby (head) learn — then the giant wakes up to help.

Why It Matters: Avoids stale momentum from frozen phase
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଶ୍ରେଣୀ blackboard ପୁରା ପୋଛ — ନୂଆ ଶିକ୍ଷକ, ନୂଆ ଆରମ୍ଭ। ପୁରୁଣା ଲେଖା ରହିଲ ତ ନୂଆ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଗୋଳ ହୋଇଯାଏ।
English Translation: Wipe the classroom blackboard clean — new teacher, fresh start. If old writing remains, new lesson gets confused.

Why It Matters: Prevents initial instability when backbone first unfreezes
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): ଥଣ୍ଡା ପାଣିରେ ସିଧା ଡେଇଁ ପଡ଼ — ଶୀତ ଲାଗିବ! ଆଗେ ଗୋଡ଼ ବୁଡ଼ାଅ, ତ ପ ଶରୀର — ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ଭାବରେ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ।
English Translation: Jump straight into cold water — you'll freeze! First dip your feet, then body — naturally prepared.

Why It Matters: Smooth learning rate reduction through training
Odia Practical Example (ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଦାହରଣ): lollipop ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଛୋଟ ହୁଏ — ଶେଷ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆନନ୍ଦ। ଏକା ଥରରେ ଗପ୍ ଦଲ ତ ଆନନ୍ଦ ଶେଷ!
English Translation: A lollipop slowly shrinks — enjoyment till the very end. Gulp it all at once and the joy is over!
